title: Bitterblossom Notification Event v1
description: Outbound notification webhook payload emitted by Bitterblossom's notify outbox.

schema_version.description: String schema id. Additive optional fields may remain on v1; removing or renaming required fields requires v2.

event.description: Stable notification event name, for example run_stale_executing, budget_blocked, or submission_arm_timed_out.

detail.description: Non-object detail value preserved when the producer is asked to notify with scalar or array detail.
